channel.title: Macos on Ivan Fraixedes' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Macos on Ivan Fraixedes' Blog

item.title: My 5 favourite tweets of the week #9
item.description:
This week security, programming languages and Linux, go ahead to see what tweets I’ve chosen.

New security issue on Apple OS X 10.10.2, so if you use OSX 10.10 and yo haven’t updated, you should do ASAP because you’re already late.

#rootpipe Full disclosure of a privilege escalation to root in Apple OS X 10.10.2 (and earlier): https://t.co/mT6EvSYqWh

— Emil Kvarnhammar (@emilkvarnhammar) April 9, 2015

A blog post about Rust and concurrency has been released, after it’s in beta and it’ll be for production soon, it’s worth to read what feature the language has to implement some interesting patterns

Fearless Concurrency with Rust http://t.co/RzmGXuPAcD

— Rust Language (@rustlang) April 10, 2015

I wasn’t aware of the Elementary Linux distribution, I don’t have any plan to use but I’ve like the concept of it

Elementary Linux released: 32bit http://t.co/6I07CZ6IIe 64bit http://t.co/pewrEkzjWE More https://t.co/lV7wdkrXlZ pic.twitter.com/5dwrDqIC6Q

— nixCraft (@nixcraft) April 11, 2015

Indoctrinate people to Linux is always good, and making it free remove all the barriers, so I support this cause and I’ve decided to share it here; furthermore the author is the creator of one of the distributions that I used quite a bit in the past, Gentoo.

Please RT. The best "Linux Fundamentals" course, by Daniel Robbins the creator of Gentoo Linux http://t.co/uQMmw2w7yQ No registration needed

— nixCraft (@nixcraft) April 11, 2015

I’ve really found very interesting about a blog post written by @ploeh, because lastly I’ve got in the same thoughts about having too many features which some of them are redundant in programming languages, frameworks, etc., rather than help in long term, they annoy.

Less is more: removing language features to leave nowhere for bugs to hide. http://t.co/6q3MHSkAe9 by @ploeh

— Tim Ruffles (@timruffles) April 14, 2015

Have a wonderful weekend!
